amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 34 — paragraph 3
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 34 — paragraph 3

## Text proposed by the Commission

3. Activities may be subcontracted or carried out by a subsidiary only with the agreement of the provider.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

3. Activities may be subcontracted or carried out by a subsidiary only with the agreement of the provider. Notified bodies shall make a list of their subsidiaries publicly available.
commission_text: 3. Activities may be subcontracted or carried out by a subsidiary only with the agreement of the provider.
parliament_text: 3. Activities may be subcontracted or carried out by a subsidiary only with the agreement of the provider. Notified bodies shall make a list of their subsidiaries publicly available.
